overview: A heartfelt apology template website where anyone can personalize sincere apology messages for three common situations: not making a video, not calling on time for study, and not respecting someone's time. Features soft, warm typography and a calm, soothing design.
features: Three customizable apology cards with pre-written sincere messages
Edit each apology message with live preview
Soft heartfelt typography and calming color palette
Fully responsive on mobile and desktop
